steps.title: Locate the clause break
steps.content: The sentence contrasts two independent clauses. The first says retroflex consonants are rare in many languages, including English. The second says they are relatively common in some dialects of Mandarin.

steps.title: Choose the contrast boundary
steps.content: Choice A joins the clauses with and, weakening the contrast and creating an awkward structure before however. Choice B gives only a comma between independent clauses. Choice C gives no punctuation before however. The answer is D.
